findings.evidence: grep for fiberHomeomorph|mapsTo_fiber returns only definitions; roadmap only lists Deck + inherited instances
findings.fix: make them private (or move into an internal namespace) until the Deck(proj) ≃* π₁ consumer arrives
findings.issue: mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, fiberHomeomorph and its two apply lemmas are public helpers with no downstream consumer yet

findings.evidence: lemma map_proj (φ : Deck p) (e : E) : p (φ.1 e) = p e := φ.2 e
findings.issue: map_proj : Deck p → E → B is the defining elimination lemma for the public definition of Deck but carries no @[simp]

findings.evidence: instance is defined after the comment that it exists solely because subgroup transfer is missing
findings.fix: keep it private unless a second consumer is declared
findings.issue: applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul is exported but only needed by Deck

summary: Deck exposes fiberHomeomorph, mapsTo_fiber and mapsTo_fiber_symm that are not required by roadmap Stage 0.4; map_proj is an unannotated elimination lemma.
